payload.topic: Here is my draft claim: 'Tree planting fixed local heat risk.' Give me feedback on whether the source evidence supports that claim.
payload.summary:
As we established earlier, I can help with feedback on your draft so you can keep your ideas and revise it in your own words.

The source evidence does not support the claim that tree planting alone fixed all local heat risks. It notes that summer surface temperatures were lower on blocks with denser canopy, but attributes this to a combination of factors including municipal grants, volunteer grou

encryption.note: Encryption at rest is not yet implemented in this service revision. This record is plaintext but remains locally stored and inspectable.
